docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY O'TOOLE,JAMES J. AS TO DEFENDANT KAMSTRA,ROB ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-15-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
